summary: Rough yet vibrant recording captures an awesome night from the spring‑86 tour.
review: The reviewer remembers this show as an "awesome time" and urges anyone who missed the Spring ’86 run to grab it, even noting the tape is a bit rough. While no specific musical moments are called out, the enthusiasm suggests a strong performance that translates well despite any technical imperfections.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; positive sentiment about the show outweighs vague comments on recording roughness, leading to a high but cautiously assigned rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions the tape is "a bit rough" but still enjoyable; no concrete details about soundboard vs. audience or clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer recalls the concert as an awesome, memorable night despite lacking specific set‑list commentary.
